folds.training_rule: Remove every row belonging to the unknown family from training and validation.
folds.test_rule: Evaluate the held-out family as Unknown together with known benign and attack-family traffic.
folds.threshold_tuning_rule: Unknown test labels must not be used to tune the rejection threshold.
